text: Welcome to Plot Twist!. You will be making your own unique version of a classic fairy tale. And what better fairy tale to start with than Cinderella! Let's begin at the beginning: the Exposition. Each player will be asked a question that will decide a key feature of our story's setting.
context: Shown at start of exposition round

text: Now that we know our setting, let's see what happens next. Time for some rising action!
The plot thickens! Another rising action round.

It all comes down to this. The scores have been tallied, and fate has chosen its players. {protagonist}, as our highest scorer, will play the hero. {antagonist}, as our lowest scorer, will play the villain. The climax of our story: {climax_type}. {climax_prompt}. The hero and villain will each secretly choose their move. Then, everyone will vote on which action shapes the story.
context: Shown at start of climax round

text: The showdown has begun. {protagonist} and {antagonist} are choosing their fate. The question: {climax_prompt}.
context: Shown to non-picking players during climax picks

text: The hero and villain have made their choices. Now it's up to everyone: which action will become part of the story? {climax_prompt}.
context: Shown on TV before climax vote options

text: And now... how does our story end?
Now that the story has been told — give it a title!
Waiting for other players to submit...
Everyone's ready! Let's see what you came up with.
context: Shown when all submissions are in

text: Thanks for playing! Here's how the story turned out.
